channel.title: Ataraxia Astro Theme
channel.description: Ataraxia is a minimal, accessible Astro v6 theme for building fast, content-focused websites.

item.title: API for AWS pricing
item.description: Looking for an easy way to get AWS pricing programitcaially? Just use the following three URI’s to get a JSON feed of transfer costs, as well as Reserved and On
